languages.original_text: {n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."

languages.text: {n}Идира обхватывает себя руками и начинает покачиваться. Ее губы покрываются изморозью.{/n} "Начало без конца, конец без начала, связаны, спутаны, идут друг за другом. И так вечность за вечностью за вечностью..."

{n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."

{n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."

languages.text: {n}Idira se cubre con los brazos y empieza a balancearse adelante y atrás. Sus labios están rodeados de escarcha.{/n} «Comienzo sin fin, fin sin comienzo, conectado, entrelazado, uno tras otro. Y una y otra vez, eternidad tras eternidad tras eternidad tras eternidad...».
languages.original_text: {n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira se cubre con los brazos y empieza a balancearse adelante y atrás. Sus labios están rodeados de escarcha.{/n} «Comienzo sin fin, fin sin comienzo, conectado, entrelazado, uno tras otro. Y una y otra vez, eternidad tras eternidad tras eternidad tras eternidad...».

languages.text: {n}伊迪拉双臂抱住自己，开始前后摇晃。她的嘴唇上结了一圈寒霜。{/n}“无终之始，无始之终，缠绕纠葛，相继相生。如此往复，永恒复永恒，无穷又无穷……”
languages.original_text: {n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊迪拉双臂抱住自己，开始前后摇晃。她的嘴唇上结了一圈寒霜。{/n}“无终之始，无始之终，缠绕纠葛，相继相生。如此往复，永恒复永恒，无穷又无穷……”

languages.text: {n}Idira serre ses bras autour d'elle et se met à se balancer d'avant en arrière. Ses lèvres sont cernées de givre.{/n} « Un début sans fin, une fin sans début, liés, entremêlés, l'un après l'autre. Encore et encore, à l'infini de l'infini de l'infini de l'infini... »
languages.original_text: {n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira serre ses bras autour d'elle et se met à se balancer d'avant en arrière. Ses lèvres sont cernées de givre.{/n} « Un début sans fin, une fin sans début, liés, entremêlés, l'un après l'autre. Encore et encore, à l'infini de l'infini de l'infini de l'infini... »

languages.text: {n}İdira, kollarına sarılıyor ve ileri geri sallanmaya başlıyor. Dudakları buz tutmuş.{/n} "Sonu olmayan başlangıç, başlangıcı olmayan son... Bağlı, dolaşık, birbiri ardına. Sonsuzluk ardına sonsuzluk ardına sonsuzluk ardına sonsuzluk boyunca böyle devam ediyor..."
languages.original_text: {n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."

traits.locale_text: {n}İdira, kollarına sarılıyor ve ileri geri sallanmaya başlıyor. Dudakları buz tutmuş.{/n} "Sonu olmayan başlangıç, başlangıcı olmayan son... Bağlı, dolaşık, birbiri ardına. Sonsuzluk ardına sonsuzluk ardına sonsuzluk ardına sonsuzluk boyunca böyle devam ediyor..."

languages.text: {n}Idira schlägt die Arme um ihren Körper und beginnt, hin- und herzuschaukeln. Ihren Lippen sind mit Frost belegt.{/n} "Ein Anfang ohne Ende, ein Ende ohne Anfang, verbunden, verwoben, eines nach dem anderen. Und immer weiter, Ewigkeit um Ewigkeit um Ewigkeit ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira schlägt die Arme um ihren Körper und beginnt, hin- und herzuschaukeln. Ihren Lippen sind mit Frost belegt.{/n} "Ein Anfang ohne Ende, ein Ende ohne Anfang, verbunden, verwoben, eines nach dem anderen. Und immer weiter, Ewigkeit um Ewigkeit um Ewigkeit ..."

languages.text:
{n}イディラは腕を組み、前後に揺れ始める。唇は霜で覆われている。{/n}
「終わりなき始まり、始まりなき終わり、繋がっている、絡み合っている、次から次へと。そして永遠に続く、永遠に続く、永遠に続く、永遠に続く…」
languages.original_text: {n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."
